{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/249-composite-skills-agent-md.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. COMPOSITE SKILLS AGENT.md


{quote}- [166-representative-agent-layer-md|166-representative-agent-layer-md.md] (сходство 0.25){quote}

----





h2. COMPOSITE SKILLS AGENT.md
markdown
{code:language=markdown}
# The Composite Skills Agent

<!-- similar-docs -->

---

**Похожие документы:**
- [166-representative-agent-layer-md](166-representative-agent-layer-md.md) (сходство 0.25)
- [344-системный-промпт-для-lorenzo-project](344-системный-промпт-для-lorenzo-project.md) (сходство 0.20)
- [208-professional-colleague-agents-md](208-professional-colleague-agents-md.md) (сходство 0.14)

<!-- backlinks-auto -->
## Упоминается в

- [Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам](../README.md)

<!-- related-auto -->
## Связанные документы

- [СИСТЕМНЫЙ ПРОМПТ ДЛЯ LORENZO PROJECT](344-системный-промпт-для-lorenzo-project.md) _77%_
- [PROFESSIONAL COLLEAGUE AGENTS.md](208-professional-colleague-agents-md.md) _53%_
- [THE DOUBLE-TRIANGLE ARCHITECTURE.md](134-the-double-triangle-architecture-md.md) _50%_
- [OPEN KNOWLEDGE WORK FOUNDATION.md](151-open-knowledge-work-foundation-md.md) _48%_
- [INFRASTRUCTURE FOR AI-COLLABORATIVE INTELLECTUAL WORK.md](273-infrastructure-for-ai-collaborative-intellectual-w.md) _48%_
- [INGIT AS COWORK-NATIVE WORKSPACE SUBSTRATE.md](304-ingit-as-cowork-native-workspace-substrate-md.md) _42%_
- [REPRESENTATIVE AGENT LAYER.md](166-representative-agent-layer-md.md) _33%_
- [Abstract](210-abstract.md) _29%_
